meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Students: Solve Debugging Hurdles with Antigravity Templates
content.seo_description: Overcome debugging roadblocks with the Antigravity project template. A beginner-friendly guide to building faster using Claude Code and AI-driven workflows.
content.answer_block: Stop staring at red error logs. The Antigravity project template provides a structured boilerplate that enforces clean architecture, making bugs easier to isolate. By pairing this with Claude Code, you transform manual troubleshooting into an automated, AI-assisted diagnostic process that accelerates your learning and stabilizes your codebase immediately.
content.intro:
You are staring at a screen filled with cryptic stack traces, the cursor blinking like a heartbeat monitor for your dying project. Every line of code feels like a liability, and the frustration of being unable to debug is the invisible wall separating aspiring coders from actual software engineers. You aren't failing; you are simply lacking a diagnostic framework.

Imagine shifting from chaotic guessing to surgical precision. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you inherit a professional-grade scaffolding designed to minimize state-related errors. Combined with the raw power of Claude Code, you gain an intelligent partner that identifies root causes before you even realize a bug exists. This is how you reclaim your momentum.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Set up the project foundation using the template to ensure modularity and clean directory structures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity web-app template with strict TypeScript configuration and error logging middleware.

steps.title: Configure Claude Code Diagnostics
steps.description: Connect Claude Code to your repository to allow it to read your file structure and monitor runtime behavior.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and create a README.md file that defines the debugging workflow for this specific architecture.

steps.title: Implement Automated Error Trapping
steps.description: Add global error boundaries to the template so that runtime crashes are caught and reported clearly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Inject a global error boundary component and a centralized logger into the Antigravity template to capture all unhandled promise rejections.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add global error boundary component'

steps.title: Execute Targeted Debugging Sessions
steps.description: Use Claude Code to isolate the specific logic causing a crash by feeding it the error logs generated in the previous step.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the latest error logs in the /logs directory and identify the exact function causing the state mismatch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Analyze /logs/error.log and suggest a fix for the identified function'

steps.title: Verify Fixes with Automated Tests
steps.description: Ensure the bug is squashed and prevented from returning by generating a unit test for the fixed module.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a unit test for the fixed function that specifically checks for the edge case that caused the previous crash.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate unit test for the fixed module'

pro_tips: Always maintain a clean 'logs' directory in your root; Claude Code performs 3x better when it can parse structured historical data.
Use 'Environment-Specific Configuration' to toggle debug logging without changing your core application logic.
When debugging, ask the AI to explain the 'why' behind the bug, not just the fix, to build your mental model of the system.
Keep your functions under 20 lines; if Claude Code can't debug it easily, it's a sign your function is doing too much.
Use the template's 'Dry-Run' mode to simulate state changes before applying actual code patches to your production branch.
content.next_steps: Once your project is stable, move on to deploying your first CI/CD pipeline using the Antigravity build scripts to ensure your code remains bug-free in production.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs define your growth as a developer. With the right template and an AI partner, you are capable of building industrial-strength software today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
